title: RoE 10 Showing in New York
wikitext:
[]: RoE 1.0 Showing in New York [No spoilers]             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Sep 01, 2009 12:33 am September 18th, 2009 Rebuild of Evangelion 1.0 will be playing in Village East Cinema. http://www.villageeastcinema.com/angelika_comingSoon.asp?hID=166&page=Coming%20Soon Address is on the site.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Sep 01, 2009 12:58 am Neat! It's cool to see that this is getting some showings around the US, even though none of them are anywhere near me. It's amusing, though, to read the goofy-sounding synopses that get written up about Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Sep 01, 2009 1:01 am I had been hoping that it might be showing at the Cambridge Film Festival which starts at the same time -- but that turns out to be completely full of fail when it comes to new films.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Sep 01, 2009 4:17 pm In the words of M. Bison "YES! YES!"

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Sep 01, 2009 4:27 pm Axell wrote: In the words of M. Bison "YES! YES!"

[]:             Quote Post by Senel17 » Tue Sep 01, 2009 8:34 pm That's good to hear. But I was kinda hoping for them to show it dubbed. Nevertheless, I'm not opposed to seeing it subbed. Cheers!

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Sep 02, 2009 1:19 pm wait this is subbed?! I'm more than fine with that! I just wanna see it in theaters!
